behavior_summary: STATUE1::look is a short process handler that runs when an actor examines the statue object.
The handler sets object info/state and excludes the process from further processing (prepares/marks the statue for inspection).
It invokes Item::bark to emit the literal inspection text "statue " directed at the examining actor/process.

The return value from Item::bark is captured and combined with an 'implies' operation before suspending and returning; this likely influences script continuation or a boolean result but does not change any observed global flags.
notable_control_flow: Script sets object info and then applies a process-exclude action to the statue (state change/cleanup for the object).

An external call to Item::bark is made; its return is used with an 'implies' opcode which then leads to suspend/return — the implies usage suggests conditional or boolean chaining affecting the immediate return value or continuation.
No global flags are read or written by the observed snippet.
open_questions: Exact semantic effect of the 'implies' opcode with the bark return value: does it change control flow, produce a boolean, or affect higher-level script scheduling?
Precise meaning of the info id set by 'set info' and the scope of 'process exclude' (is the statue permanently excluded or temporarily flagged?).
Whether the bark return value can carry error/diagnostic info that higher-level code relies upon.
Whether any other event handlers in the same process rely on the info/ exclusion state set here (not visible in this snippet).

main_function.name: U8P_STATUE1::look
main_function.purpose: Respond to an actor examining the statue by marking the object state and emitting a short descriptive string ('statue ') to the examiner.
entry_conditions: Event 0 (U8P_STATUE1::look) — triggered when an actor looks at/examines the statue

function_map.name: U8P_STATUE1::look
function_map.role: Process handler for the statue object's 'U8P_STATUE1::look' (examine) event.

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Engine/item method used to emit/display a short message (bark) to a target process/player.

external_calls.purpose: Have the statue process emit the inspection text 'statue ' to the viewing actor/process (display a short description/bark).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: STATUE1::look is a short process handler that runs when an actor examines the statue object.
